title: Resource Browser (Write Script)
text: Resource Browser (Write Script) Copy and paste code snippets into the Script Editor. Uniface provides the default libraries for HTML and ProcScript: UHTML_COMMON—HTML snippets for server page layouts USCRIPT_COMMON—common Script snippets USCRIPT_API—trigger snippets for application shells USCRIPT_ CPT —trigger snippets for specific component types Note: USYSLIBSNP is the template for snippet libraries. How to To select a snippet library, click libsnp in the U-Bar of the Resource Browser, and select the library you want to use. To insert a snippet, select a snippet and right-click in either the Resource Browser or the code editor and use the menu to insert or copy and paste snippets in the desired location. If you select and copy multiple snippets, their content is pasted with a line feed separating the different snippets. Find and Insert Snippets Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
